0001: #!/usr/bin/env python3
0002: """
0003: SESSION_STATE Manager v2.1 - Manage conversation state files
0004: 
0005: Commands:
0006:   init    - Initialize SESSION_STATE.md for a conversation
0007:   update  - Update a field in SESSION_STATE.md
0008:   sync    - Bulk update multiple sections from JSON (for Librarian)
0009:   check   - Display current SESSION_STATE.md
0010:   audit   - Check for TBD placeholders and missing content
0011: 
0012: Usage:
0013:   python3 session_state_manager.py init --convo-id con_XXX [--type build|research|discussion|planning]
0014:   python3 session_state_manager.py init --convo-id con_XXX --build my-project --worker-num 1 --parent-topic "My Project"
0015:   python3 session_state_manager.py update --convo-id con_XXX --field status --value active
0016:   python3 session_state_manager.py sync --convo-id con_XXX --json '{"Progress": {...}, "Covered": [...]}'
0017:   python3 session_state_manager.py check --convo-id con_XXX
0018:   python3 session_state_manager.py audit --convo-id con_XXX
0019: """
0020: 
0021: import argparse
0022: import sys
0023: import json as json_module
0024: from pathlib import Path
0025: from datetime import datetime, timezone
0026: import re
0027: 
0028: 
0029: class SessionStateManager:
0030:     """Manage SESSION_STATE.md files for conversations."""
0031:     
0032:     WORKSPACE_BASE = Path("/home/.z/workspaces")
0033:     
0034:     # Auto-classification keywords
0035:     CLASSIFICATION_KEYWORDS = {
0036:         "build": ["implement", "code", "script", "create", "develop", "build", "fix", "refactor"],
0037:         "research": ["research", "analyze", "learn", "study", "investigate", "explore", "find"],
0038:         "discussion": ["discuss", "think", "brainstorm", "consider", "talk", "conversation"],
0039:         "planning": ["plan", "strategy", "decide", "organize", "roadmap", "design", "architect"]
0040:     }
0041:     
0042:     # Schema for SESSION_STATE sections
0043:     SCHEMA = {
0044:         "Metadata": {
0045:             "fields": ["Type", "Mode", "Focus", "Objective", "Status"],
0046:             "required": ["Focus", "Objective"]
0047:         },
0048:         "Progress": {
0049:             "fields": ["Overall", "Current Phase", "Next Actions"],
0050:             "required": ["Overall", "Current Phase"]
0051:         },
0052:         "Covered": {"type": "list", "required": True},
0053:         "Topics": {"type": "list", "required": False},
0054:         "Key Insights": {"type": "list", "required": False},
0055:         "Decisions Made": {"type": "list", "required": False},
0056:         "Open Questions": {"type": "list", "required": False},
0057:         "Artifacts": {"type": "artifact_list", "required": False}
0058:     }
0059:     
0060:     def __init__(self, convo_id: str):
0061:         self.convo_id = convo_id
0062:         self.workspace_path = self.WORKSPACE_BASE / convo_id
0063:         self.session_state_path = self.workspace_path / "SESSION_STATE.md"
0064:     
0065:     def init(self, conv_type: str = None, mode: str = None, user_message: str = None,
0066:              focus: str = None, objective: str = None,
0067:              build_id: str = None, worker_num: int = None, parent_topic: str = None) -> bool:
0068:         """
0069:         Initialize SESSION_STATE.md for the conversation.
0070:         
0071:         New params for worker support:
0072:           build_id: Build project slug (e.g., "deal-meeting-intel")
0073:           worker_num: Worker number within the build
0074:           parent_topic: Human-readable topic for greppable tags
0075:         """
0076:         # Parse BUILD_CONTEXT from user_message if present
0077:         if user_message and not build_id:
0078:             parsed = self._parse_build_context(user_message)
0079:             if parsed:
0080:                 build_id = parsed.get("build") or parsed.get("build_id")
0081:                 worker_num = parsed.get("worker") or parsed.get("worker_num")
0082:                 parent_topic = parsed.get("parent_topic") or parsed.get("topic")
0083:         
0084:         # Auto-classify if no type provided
0085:         if not conv_type and user_message:
0086:             conv_type = self._classify_conversation(user_message)
0087:         elif not conv_type:
0088:             conv_type = "discussion"
0089:         
0090:         # Infer mode - worker if we have build context
0091:         if build_id and worker_num:
0092:             mode = "worker"
0093:         elif not mode:
0094:             mode = self._infer_mode()
0095:         
0096:         # Derive focus from user_message if not explicitly provided
0097:         derived_focus = focus
0098:         if not derived_focus and user_message:
0099:             derived_focus = self._derive_focus(user_message)
0100:         
0101:         # Ensure workspace exists
0102:         self.workspace_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
0103:         
0104:         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
0105:         
0106:         # Build YAML frontmatter
0107:         frontmatter_lines = [
0108:             "---",
0109:             f"conversation_id: {self.convo_id}",
0110:             f"type: {conv_type}",
0111:             f"mode: {mode}",
0112:             f"status: active",
0113:             f"created: {now.isoformat()}",
0114:             f"last_updated: {now.isoformat()}",
0115:         ]
0116:         
0117:         # Add build context to frontmatter if this is a worker
0118:         if build_id:
0119:             frontmatter_lines.append(f"build_id: {build_id}")
